title: Water Boyy
original_title: รักใสใส..วัยรุ่นชอบ
overview: A group of male swimmer, focusing on two of them, with their daily life. The first meeting wasn't so bad. But next thing he know, his hands was tied and his mouth choked with a cloth only to find his mates circling around him and telling him rumours about his roommate.
